title: Sour Pickle Crumble
description: A tangy dessert combining the flavors of sour pickles with a sweet crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the chopped pickles and sugar.
In a separate bowl, combine the flour and cold butter, using a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into a crumbly mixture.
Add the crumble to the bowl with the pickle mixture and stir until just combined.
Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
Pour the mixture into a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Top with additional crumble mixture if desired.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is set.
Serve warm, topped with ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
